title: ChoriCraft Snepy
description: ChoriCraft Snepy: The official, custom client for the Snepy community. Dive into the unique server experience with built-in voice chat, Stream Emotes, and a modified user interface full of community references and memes. Get ready for fun!
body:
**Welcome to ChoriCraft Snepy!**
ChoriCraft Snepy is the official, custom client created by Bacon for Snepy's Minecraft server. This modpack is designed exclusively for community members who are looking for the full, casual server experience.
**Integrated** Voice Chat: Communicate easily and directly with other players without needing external software.
Stream Emotes Implemented: Use all the community's emotes and references directly in the game.
Modified User Interface: Enjoy a custom main menu and environments designed to celebrate the Snepy community's memes and lore.
Custom Messages and Descriptions: The client includes unique descriptions and messages related to the Snepy channel and its most iconic moments.
**Who is This Modpack For?**
This modpack is ideal for casual players and, most importantly, for members of the Snepy community. If you play on the server or follow the channel, this client is essential for a total immersion in the experience we've created.
